odorsleuth.d: Enables a Ghost-type target to be hit by Normal- and Fighting-type attacks. This also enables an evasive target to be hit.

rocktomb.d: Boulders are hurled at the target. This also lowers the targetâ€™s Speed stat by preventing its movement.

silverwind.d: The target is attacked with powdery scales blown by wind. This may also raise all the userâ€™s stats.

metalsound.d: A horrible sound like scraping metal harshly lowers the targetâ€™s Sp. Def stat.

grasswhistle.d: The user plays a pleasant melody that lulls the target into a deep sleep.

tickle.d: The user tickles the target into laughing, reducing its Attack and Defense stats.

cosmicpower.d: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to raise its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

waterspout.d: The user spouts water to damage opposing PokÃ©mon. The lower the userâ€™s HP, the lower the moveâ€™s power.

signalbeam.d: The user attacks with a sinister beam of light. This may also confuse the target.

shadowpunch.d: The user throws a punch from the shadows. This attack never misses.

extrasensory.d: The user attacks with an odd, unseeable power. This may also make the target flinch.

skyuppercut.d: The user attacks the target with an uppercut thrown skyward with force.

sandtomb.d: The user traps the target inside a harshly raging sandstorm for four to five turns.

sheercold.d: The target is attacked with a blast of absolute-zero cold. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.

bulletseed.d: The user forcefully shoots seeds at the target two to five times in a row.

aerialace.d: The user confounds the target with speed, then slashes. This attack never misses.

iciclespear.d: The user launches sharp icicles at the target two to five times in a row.

irondefense.d: The user hardens its bodyâ€™s surface like iron, sharply raising its Defense stat.

howl.d: The user howls loudly to raise its spirit, which raises its Attack stat.

dragonclaw.d: The user slashes the target with huge, sharp claws.
dragonclaw.fx: no secondary effect > 10% to raise attack

frenzyplant.d: The user slams the target with an enormous tree. The user canâ€™t move on the next turn.
frenzyplant.fx: Recharge > drops user’s def and spdef by 1 stage, (now has same ai as brave bird)

bulkup.d: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, raising both its Attack and Defense stats.

bounce.d: The user bounces up high, then drops on the target on the second turn. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

mudshot.d: The user attacks by hurling a blob of mud at the target. This also lowers the targetâ€™s Speed stat.

poisontail.d: The user hits the target with its tail. This may also poison the target. Critical hits land more easily.

covet.d: The user endearingly approaches the target, then steals the targetâ€™s held item.

volttackle.d: The user electrifies itself, then charges. This also damages the user quite a lot. This may leave the target with paralysis.

magicalleaf.d: The user scatters curious leaves that chase the target. This attack never misses.

calmmind.d: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to raise its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

leafblade.d: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and attacks by cutting its target. Critical hits land more easily.

dragondance.d: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerful dance that raises its Attack and Speed stats.

rockblast.d: The user hurls hard rocks at the target. Two to five rocks are launched in a row.

shockwave.d: The user strikes the target with a quick jolt of electricity. This attack never misses.

waterpulse.d: The user attacks the target with a pulsing blast of water. This may also confuse the target.

psychoboost.d: The user attacks the target at full power. The attackâ€™s recoil harshly lowers the userâ€™s Sp. Atk stat.

roost.d: The user lands and rests its body. It restores the userâ€™s HP by up to half of its max HP.

gravity.d: Gravity is intensified for five turns, making moves involving flying unusable and negating Levitate.

miracleeye.d: Enables a Dark-type target to be hit by Psychic-type attacks. This also enables an evasive target to be hit.

wakeupslap.d: This attack inflicts big damage on a sleeping target. This also wakes the target up, however.

hammerarm.d: The user swings and hits with its strong and heavy fist. It lowers the userâ€™s Speed, however.

gyroball.d: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user compared to the target, the greater the moveâ€™s power.

brine.d: If the targetâ€™s HP is half or less, this attack will hit with double the power.

naturalgift.d: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines the moveâ€™s type and power.

pluck.d: The user pecks the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

tailwind.d: The user whips up a turbulent whirlwind that ups the Speed stat of the user and its allies for four turns.

metalburst.d: The user retaliates with much greater power against the opponent that last inflicted damage on it.

uturn.d: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party PokÃ©mon in waiting.

closecombat.d: The user fights the target up close without guarding itself. This also lowers the userâ€™s Defense and Sp. Def stats.
closecombat.fx: now has same ai as brave bird

payback.d: The user stores power, then attacks. If the user moves after the target, this attackâ€™s power will be doubled.

embargo.d: This move prevents the target from using its held item. Its Trainer is also prevented from using items on it.

fling.d: The user flings its held item at the target to attack. This moveâ€™s power and effects depend on the item.

psychoshift.d: Using its psychic power of suggestion, the user transfers its status conditions to the target.

gastroacid.d: The user hurls up its stomach acids on the target. The fluid eliminates the effect of the targetâ€™s Ability.

lastresort.d: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

worryseed.d: A seed that causes worry is planted on the target. It prevents sleep by making the targetâ€™s Ability Insomnia.

suckerpunch.d: This move enables the user to attack first. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

toxicspikes.d: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the opposing teamâ€™s feet. They poison opposing PokÃ©mon that switch into battle.

heartswap.d: The user employs its psychic power to switch stat changes with the target.

aquaring.d: The user envelops itself in a veil made of water. It regains some HP every turn.

magnetrise.d: The user levitates using electrically generated magnetism for five turns.

flareblitz.d: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges the target. This also damages the user quite a lot. This may leave the target with a burn.

rockpolish.d: The user polishes its body to reduce drag. This can sharply raise the Speed stat.

darkpulse.d: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. This may also make the target flinch.

nightslash.d: The user slashes the target the instant an opportunity arises. Critical hits land more easily.

aquatail.d: The user attacks by swinging its tail as if it were a vicious wave in a raging storm.

seedbomb.d: The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

airslash.d: The user attacks with a blade of air that slices even the sky. This may also make the target flinch.

xscissor.d: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.
xscissor.fx: no secondary effect > high crit ratio

bugbuzz.d: The user vibrates its wings to generate a damaging sound wave. This may also lower the targetâ€™s Sp. Def stat.

dragonpulse.d: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the userâ€™s gaping mouth.

dragonrush.d: The user tackles the target while exhibiting overwhelming menace. This may also make the target flinch.

powergem.d: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

vacuumwave.d: The user whirls its fists to send a wave of pure vacuum at the target. This move always goes first.

energyball.d: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the targetâ€™s Sp. Def.

bravebird.d: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

switcheroo.d: The user trades held items with the target faster than the eye can follow.

gigaimpact.d: The user charges at the target using every bit of its power. The user canâ€™t move on the next turn.

bulletpunch.d: The user strikes the target with tough punches as fast as bullets. This move always goes first.

avalanche.d: An attack move that inflicts double the damage if the user has been hurt by the target in the same turn.

iceshard.d: The user flash-freezes chunks of ice and hurls them at the target. This move always goes first.

shadowclaw.d: The user slashes with a sharp claw made from shadows. Critical hits land more easily.

zenheadbutt.d: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

mirrorshot.d: The user lets loose a flash of energy at the target from its polished body. This may also lower the targetâ€™s accuracy.

flashcannon.d: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it at once. This may also lower the targetâ€™s Sp. Def stat.

rockclimb.d: The user attacks the target by smashing into it with incredible force. This may also confuse the target.

lavaplume.d: The user torches everything around it with an inferno of scarlet flames. This may also leave those hit with a burn.

seedflare.d: The user emits a shock wave from its body to attack its target. This may also harshly lower the targetâ€™s Sp. Def.

stormthrow.d: The user strikes the target with a fierce blow. This attack always results in a critical hit.

flameburst.d: The user attacks the target with a bursting flame. The bursting flame damages PokÃ©mon next to the target as well.

sludgewave.d: The user strikes everything around it by swamping the area with a giant sludge wave. This may also poison those hit.

quiverdance.d: The user lightly performs a beautiful, mystic dance. This boosts the userâ€™s Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed stats.

heavyslam.d: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the moveâ€™s power.

entrainment.d: The user dances with an odd rhythm that compels the target to mimic it, making the targetâ€™s Ability the same as the userâ€™s.

round.d: The user attacks the target with a song. Others can join in the Round and make the attack do greater damage.

storedpower.d: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the userâ€™s stats are raised, the greater the moveâ€™s power.

allyswitch.d: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies.

scald.d: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

hex.d: This relentless attack does massive damage to a target affected by status conditions.

shiftgear.d: The user rotates its gears, raising its Attack and sharply raising its Speed.

incinerate.d: The user attacks opposing PokÃ©mon with fire. If a PokÃ©mon is holding a certain item, such as a Berry, the item becomes burned up and unusable.

quash.d: The user suppresses the target and makes its move go last.

inferno.d: The user attacks by engulfing the target in an intense fire. This leaves the target with a burn.

voltswitch.d: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party PokÃ©mon in waiting.

frostbreath.d: The user blows its cold breath on the target. This attack always results in a critical hit.

dragontail.d: The target is knocked away, and a different PokÃ©mon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single PokÃ©mon.

workup.d: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats increase.

electroweb.d: The user attacks and captures opposing PokÃ©mon using an electric net. This lowers their Speed stat.

snarl.d: The user yells as if itâ€™s ranting about something, which lowers the Sp. Atk stat of opposing PokÃ©mon.
